age_classification.methodology: Based on updatedAt date. Today: 2026-05-26. Active ≤14d, Aging 15-30d, Stale 31-90d, Zombie >90d.

active.evidence: 100 confirmed from most-recently-updated page (all updated 2026-05-23 to 2026-05-26). Remaining ~168 estimated from 2026-05-24 multi-page sample ratios.

aging.evidence: Interpolated from prior multi-page sample distribution.

stale.evidence: Dominant cohort. Confirmed from prior sample; consistent with batch-close pattern.

zombie.evidence: Confirmed from prior oldest-100 page. Likely undercount.
